news.title: Super Traffic Racer Reaches 10 Million Plays
news.summary: Super Traffic Racer has become one of the most played online racing games this year, with over 10 million sessions recorded globally.

news.title: New Cars and Skins Added in Latest Update
news.summary: A new update brings 5 high-performance vehicles and fresh customization options, including neon skins and futuristic decals.

news.title: Online Time Trial Event Announced
news.summary: Compete against players worldwide in the new Time Trial Challenge. Top scorers will be featured on the global leaderboard.

news.title: Player Designs Stunning Custom Highway Map
news.summary: A passionate player shared a fan-made highway map concept with dynamic weather and branching routes. The community is loving it!

news.title: World Record Set: 50 Minutes Without Crashing
news.summary: Speedrunner FastLanePro set a new world record by surviving traffic mayhem for 50 straight minutes in Hardcore Mode.

news.title: Official Super Traffic Racer Soundtrack Released
news.summary: The dynamic soundtrack of Super Traffic Racer is now available on major music platforms, featuring pulse-pounding synthwave tracks.
